commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `msteams` voice-call provider, a HMAC-authenticated Teams bridge WebSocket transport, Teams runtime/STT/TTS wiring, config and SecretRef metadata, and provider/transport tests.

PR surface: Source +1210, Tests +677, Docs +8. Total +1895 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the Teams WebSocket path, transcript persistence path, missing cap parity, and config validation behavior. I did not run a live Teams call; the PR supplies redacted live-call proof for the happy path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This PR needs maintainer product/security review before any automated repair lane, because bundled-versus-plugin ownership and Teams recording-status obligations are policy decisions as well as code changes.
